[{'text': "The robot is at (11.51, 13.67) facing right (east, ~0°). The destination is at (3.98, 7.87) — that's to the **left** (west) and **down** (south). I need to:
1. Turn left (west) to move along the current white corridor
2. Navigate down to the lower corridor where the green destination is

Let me start by rotating 180° to face west (left).", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01JhzYwao9oZmytLxXAtX1D7', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': 180}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
